query:
ALTER TABLE subscriptions 
  CHANGE COLUMN stripeSubscriptionId wompiPaymentSourceId VARCHAR(100),
  CHANGE COLUMN stripePriceId wompiCardToken VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN cardBrand VARCHAR(20) AFTER wompiCardToken,
  ADD COLUMN cardLastFour VARCHAR(4) AFTER cardBrand,
  ADD COLUMN cardHolderName VARCHAR(255) AFTER cardLastFour,
  ADD COLUMN monthlyAmountCents BIGINT DEFAULT 0 AFTER cardHolderName,
  ADD COLUMN lastPaymentDate TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER monthlyAmountCents,
  ADD COLUMN lastPaymentReference VARCHAR(255) AFTER lastPaymentDate,
  ADD COLUMN failedPaymentCount INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER lastPaymentReference;
